name: Lantz's Microwave Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar into the fat until well combined.
2. Blend in the eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, cocoa powder, and salt) and add them to the wet mixture. Stir until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a greased microwave-safe baking dish measuring 8" x 8" x 2".
5. Microwave on medium-high for 8-10 minutes.
6. If desired, sprinkle with nuts or chocolate chips before cooking.
7. Cover with wax paper and let stand to cool.
